secciones.titulo: Home Handyman Repair Services In the Largo, Clearwater, Seminole area
secciones.contenido: Professional home handyman repair services serving Central Pinellas County.

imagenes.descripcion: Hero background image showing handyman working under a sink

secciones.titulo: ATH Home Handyman Services Gets The Small Jobs Done
secciones.contenido: Around The House Home Handyman Services is a family-owned and operated business with over 30 years of experience in the residential repair, remodeling, and construction industry. We specialize in tackling your home's to-do list with professional, high-quality handyman service at a reasonable price. Serving Central Pinellas County including Clearwater, St. Petersburg, Largo, Seminole, Pinellas Park, Palm Harbor, Belleair, Indian Rocks, Indian Shores, Belleair Beach, Belleair Bluffs, Bardmoor, Reddington Beach, and Reddington Shores.

imagenes.descripcion: Image of handyman performing repair installation work

secciones.contenido: At Around The House we focus on getting the small jobs done in a reliable and professional manner. The owner, Ryan, performs all on-site work personally. Uses quality materials and tools. Offers flexible scheduling accommodating evenings and weekends. Provides upfront estimates with competitive pricing without quality compromise. If a client would be better served elsewhere, Ryan will let you know and offer referrals when appropriate.

secciones.titulo: What We Do - Professional Home Maintenance and Repair Services
secciones.contenido:
Carpentry: I offer a wide range of carpentry services, including framing, trim work, custom cabinetry, and custom furniture.

Furniture Repair: Have a piece of nice furniture that sustained some damage. I've been building custom furniture for years so odds are I can fix it up for you.

Furniture Assembly: Did you bring home a car full of boxes from Ikea or another big box store? I can get those items assembled and installed for you quickly.

Vacation/Airbnb Home Maintenance: Have a vacation home or Airbnb in the area...I'll get it back in tip top shape for your next guests.

Painting: I provide interior painting services, including prep work, priming, and painting with high-quality paints.

Drywall: Have a small drywall repair? I can fix that for you.

Electrical: I can help with minor electrical needs, from installing light fixtures and ceiling fans to troubleshooting minor electrical problems.

Plumbing: Is your toilet running? I can help with repair and maintenance of faucets, toilets, showers, and other plumbing fixtures.

General Repairs: We can handle all types of general repairs, from fixing leaky faucets to repairing damaged walls and floors.

There's too much to list. Making a comprehensive list of every service...Feel free to contact me today to discuss your project and schedule your next repair!
Gallery showcasing 29 images of completed handyman work projects.
Get a Free Quote or Feel Free to Call or Text 727-386-8528

We stay in constant communication with our customers until the job is done. To get a free quote, or if you have questions or special requests, just drop us a line. Home handyman services in Central Pinellas County including Clearwater, St. Petersburg, Largo, Seminole, Pinellas Park, Palm Harbor, Belleair, Indian Rocks, Indian Shores, Belleair Beach, Belleair Bluffs, Bardmoor, Reddington Beach, and Reddington Shores.

secciones.titulo: What I can't help you with
secciones.contenido:
While I'd love to have your business, I'm very transparent about what I can and am willing to do. If it's something I'm not comfortable with, I'll let you know and point you in the right direction if I know someone I trust to do the job for you.

Services NOT provided: Roofing, Lawn/Yard Maintenance, Large Scale Remodeling, Pressure Washing.

secciones.titulo: About Around The House Home Services
secciones.contenido: At Around The House we focus on getting the small jobs done in a reliable and professional manner. Expert Home Repair Services with quality materials and tools. Flexible Scheduling accommodating evenings and weekends. Competitive Pricing with upfront estimates without quality compromise. The owner Ryan performs all on-site work personally and is transparent about capabilities, offering referrals when a job falls outside his expertise.

textos_clave.propuesta_valor: Family-owned and operated business with over 30 years of experience in the residential repair, remodeling, and construction industry. Professional, high-quality handyman service at a reasonable price.
